Entries.Name: Business Kweebec
Entries.Line: Yes, well, I do respect the hustle.

Entries.Name: Business Kweebec
Entries.Line: You're far from the first to have sniffed out my wealth and thought, 'well, that rich old lady has no one else up there. I bet she's sooo lonely.'

Entries.Name: Business Kweebec
Entries.Line: All I can say is that you better spend that time on something more productive, hm? There are more efficient ways to grind some wealth than by throwing yourself at women.

Entries.Name: Narrator
Entries.Line: She glares at you like she can't decide whether to throw you out, or entertain you further. Or, more accurately, whether she'll continue allowing *you* to entertain *her*.

Entries.Name: Narrator
Entries.Line: Whatever response you prepared is killed by her commanding presence. Kweebecs normally act like what you'd expect out of little tree elves: they are whimsical, demure.

Line.Text: She defies that stereotype in a way that no other Kweebec will, and that's enough to utterly short-circuit your brain.
